name: @deckup/theme-google-basic
description: A Google-inspired presentation theme with Roboto typography, bright blue panels, and clean geometric accents.

cover.description: Opens with a left-aligned white title on a blue field with a folded-corner accent.

number.description: Centers an oversized dark metric with a concise gray caption on a light background.

page.description: Places a white title in a blue header band above structured content on a light canvas.

quote.description: Centers a large gray quotation above a short blue rule and supporting attribution.

section.description: Introduces a section with a large left-aligned white title on a solid blue field.

statement.description: Centers an oversized white statement on a solid blue field.

two-column.description: Places a white title in a blue header band above two evenly spaced content columns.
